popularStory.headline:
Joanna Strutt Belgrave
(about 1541 – August 1577)
popularStory.description:
Joanna Strutt was the daughter of John and Catherine Strutt of Glemsford, Suffolk, England, the town in which she was probably born. 

On September 22, 1560, she married John Belgrave at Glemsford, at …

zh.lifeSummary: Joanna Strutt是John Strutt和Catherine的女兒，於1541年7月15日出生在英國素福爾可巴貝。她於1560年9月22日與John Belgrave在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1577年8月14日在英國坎布利其爾列福林頓享年36歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾列福林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joanna Strutt是John Strutt和Catherine的女儿，于1541年7月15日出生在英国素福爾可巴貝。她于1560年9月22日与John Belgrave在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1577年8月14日在英国坎布利其爾列福林頓享年36岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾列福林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Strutt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German struot, strūt ‘brush, thicket, swamp’, or a habitational name from any of several places called Struth with this word.

variants.name: Strout
meanings: English: nickname for an argumentative person, from Middle English strout, strut ‘strife, dispute, debate’ (Old English strūt).
English: from the Old Norse personal name Strútr, Strut, apparently a nickname from strútr ‘pointed hood’ (referring to a cone-like ornament on a headdress or cap).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Dutch Stroet: habitational name from Stroet in North Holland or a topographic name from Dutch stroet ‘brush, thicket, swamp’.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Joanna Strutt was born on 15 July 1541, in Babergh, Suffolk, England as the daughter of John Strutt and Catherine. She married John Belgrave on 22 September 1560, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 14 August 1577, in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Joanna Strutt est née le 15 juillet 1541, à Babergh, Suffolk, Angleterre, fille de John Strutt et Catherine. Elle a épousé John Belgrave le 22 septembre 1560, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 août 1577, à Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Joanna Strutt wurde am 15. Juli 1541 in Babergh, Suffolk, England, als Tochter von John Strutt und Catherine geboren. Sie hat am 22. September 1560 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England John Belgrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. August 1577 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Joanna Strutt è nata il il 15 luglio 1541 nel Babergh, Suffolk, England come figlia di John Strutt e Catherine. Lei sposato John Belgrave il 22 settembre 1560, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 14 agosto 1577, nel Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Struttは1541年7月15日にイギリススフォルクババーグでJohn StruttとCatherineの娘として生まれた。1560年9月22日にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでJohn Belgraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1577年8月14日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアレバーイントンで36歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアレバーイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Strutt(은)는 1541년 7월 15일 영국 수폴크 베이버그h에서 John Strutt(와)과 Catherine의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1560년 9월 22일 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 John Belgrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1577년 8월 14일 영국 캄브리지실르 레버링턴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 레버링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.15 Jul 1541–Aug 14, 1577: 15 de julho de 1541–14 de agosto de 1577
pt.lifeSummary: Joanna Strutt nasceu em 15 de julho de 1541, em Babergh, Suffolk, Inglaterra filha de John Strutt e Catherine. Ela casou-se com John Belgrave em 22 de setembro de 1560, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1577, em Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Joanna Strutt родилась 15 июля 1541 г. в местности бабирг, суффолк, Англия. Её родителей звали John Strutt и Catherine. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Belgrave 22 сентября 1560 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 14 августа 1577 г. в местности ливирингтон, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности ливирингтон, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.15 Jul 1541–Aug 14, 1577: 15 de julio de 1541–14 de agosto de 1577
es.lifeSummary: Joanna Strutt nació el 15 de julio de 1541, en Babergh, Suffolk, Inglaterra como hija de John Strutt y Catherine. Se casó con John Belgrave el 22 de septiembre de 1560, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1577, en Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
